Article_Name: List of criminal offences referred to in Article 5(1), first subparagraph, point (h)(iii)
Processed_Text: criminal offence refer article 5(1 subparagraph point h)(iii terrorism traffic human being sexual exploitation child child pornography illicit trafficking narcotic drug psychotropic substance illicit trafficking weapon munition explosive murder grievous bodily injury illicit trade human organ tissue illicit trafficking nuclear radioactive material kidnapping illegal restraint hostage taking crime jurisdiction international criminal court unlawful seizure aircraft ship rape environmental crime organise armed robbery sabotage participation criminal organisation involve offence list
Raw_Text: Criminal offences referred to in Article 5(1), first subparagraph, point (h)(iii): — terrorism, — trafficking in human beings, — sexual exploitation of children, and child pornography, — illicit trafficking in narcotic drugs or psychotropic substances, — illicit trafficking in weapons, munitions or explosives, — murder, grievous bodily injury, — illicit trade in human organs or tissue, — illicit trafficking in nuclear or radioactive materials, — kidnapping, illegal restraint or hostage-taking, — crimes within the jurisdiction of the International Criminal Court, — unlawful seizure of aircraft or ships, — rape, — environmental crime, — organised or armed robbery, — sabotage, — participation in a criminal organisation involved in one or more of the offences listed above.

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: high risk ai system pursuant article 6(2 ai system list following area
Raw_Text: High-risk AI systems pursuant to Article 6(2) are the AI systems listed in any of the following areas:

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: biometric far use permit relevant union national law
Raw_Text: Biometrics, in so far as their use is permitted under relevant Union or national law:

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: remote biometric identification system shall not include ai system intend biometric verification sole purpose confirm specific natural person person claim
Raw_Text: remote biometric identification systems. This shall not include AI systems intended to be used for biometric verification the sole purpose of which is to confirm that a specific natural person is the person he or she claims to be;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend biometric categorisation accord sensitive protect attribute characteristic base inference attribute characteristic
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used for biometric categorisation, according to sensitive or protected attributes or characteristics based on the inference of those attributes or characteristics;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend emotion recognition
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used for emotion recognition.

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: critical infrastructure ai system intend safety component management operation critical digital infrastructure road traffic supply water gas heating electricity
Raw_Text: Critical infrastructure: AI systems intended to be used as safety components in the management and operation of critical digital infrastructure, road traffic, or in the supply of water, gas, heating or electricity.

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: education vocational training
Raw_Text: Education and vocational training:

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend determine access admission assign natural person educational vocational training institution level
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used to determine access or admission or to assign natural persons to educational and vocational training institutions at all levels;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend evaluate learning outcome include outcome steer learning process natural person educational vocational training institution level
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used to evaluate learning outcomes, including when those outcomes are used to steer the learning process of natural persons in educational and vocational training institutions at all levels;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend purpose assess appropriate level education individual receive able access context educational vocational training institution level
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used for the purpose of assessing the appropriate level of education that an individual will receive or will be able to access, in the context of or within educational and vocational training institutions at all levels;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend monitoring detect prohibit behaviour student test context educational vocational training institution level
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used for monitoring and detecting prohibited behaviour of students during tests in the context of or within educational and vocational training institutions at all levels.

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: employment worker management access self employment
Raw_Text: Employment, workers’ management and access to self-employment:

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend recruitment selection natural person particular place target job advertisement analyse filter job application evaluate candidate
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used for the recruitment or selection of natural persons, in particular to place targeted job advertisements, to analyse and filter job applications, and to evaluate candidates;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend decision affect term work relate relationship promotion termination work relate contractual relationship allocate task base individual behaviour personal trait characteristic monitor evaluate performance behaviour person relationship
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used to make decisions affecting terms of work-related relationships, the promotion or termination of work-related contractual relationships, to allocate tasks based on individual behaviour or personal traits or characteristics or to monitor and evaluate the performance and behaviour of persons in such relationships.

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: access enjoyment essential private service essential public service benefit
Raw_Text: Access to and enjoyment of essential private services and essential public services and benefits:

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend public authority behalf public authority evaluate eligibility natural person essential public assistance benefit service include healthcare service grant reduce revoke reclaim benefit service
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by public authorities or on behalf of public authorities to evaluate the eligibility of natural persons for essential public assistance benefits and services, including healthcare services, as well as to grant, reduce, revoke, or reclaim such benefits and services;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend evaluate creditworthiness natural person establish credit score exception ai system purpose detect financial fraud
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used to evaluate the creditworthiness of natural persons or establish their credit score, with the exception of AI systems used for the purpose of detecting financial fraud;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend risk assessment pricing relation natural person case life health insurance
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used for risk assessment and pricing in relation to natural persons in the case of life and health insurance;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend evaluate classify emergency call natural person dispatch establish priority dispatching emergency response service include police firefighter medical aid emergency healthcare patient triage system
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to evaluate and classify emergency calls by natural persons or to be used to dispatch, or to establish priority in the dispatching of, emergency first response services, including by police, firefighters and medical aid, as well as of emergency healthcare patient triage systems.

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: law enforcement far use permit relevant union national law
Raw_Text: Law enforcement, in so far as their use is permitted under relevant Union or national law:

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend behalf law enforcement authority union institution body office agency support law enforcement authority behalf assess risk natural person victim criminal offence
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by or on behalf of law enforcement authorities, or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies in support of law enforcement authorities or on their behalf to assess the risk of a natural person becoming the victim of criminal offences;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend behalf law enforcement authority union institution body office agency support law enforcement authority polygraph similar tool
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by or on behalf of law enforcement authorities or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies in support of law enforcement authorities as polygraphs or similar tools;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend behalf law enforcement authority union institution body office agency support law enforcement authority evaluate reliability evidence course investigation prosecution criminal offence
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by or on behalf of law enforcement authorities, or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies, in support of law enforcement authorities to evaluate the reliability of evidence in the course of the investigation or prosecution of criminal offences;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend law enforcement authority behalf union institution body office agency support law enforcement authority assess risk natural person offend offend not solely basis profiling natural person refer article 3(4 directive eu 2016/680 assess personality trait characteristic past criminal behaviour natural person group
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by law enforcement authorities or on their behalf or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies in support of law enforcement authorities for assessing the risk of a natural person offending or re-offending not solely on the basis of the profiling of natural persons as referred to in Article 3(4) of Directive (EU) 2016/680, or to assess personality traits and characteristics or past criminal behaviour of natural persons or groups;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend behalf law enforcement authority union institution body office agency support law enforcement authority profiling natural person refer article 3(4 directive eu 2016/680 course detection investigation prosecution criminal offence
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by or on behalf of law enforcement authorities or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies in support of law enforcement authorities for the profiling of natural persons as referred to in Article 3(4) of Directive (EU) 2016/680 in the course of the detection, investigation or prosecution of criminal offences.

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: migration asylum border control management far use permit relevant union national law
Raw_Text: Migration, asylum and border control management, in so far as their use is permitted under relevant Union or national law:

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend behalf competent public authority union institution body office agency polygraph similar tool
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by or on behalf of competent public authorities or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies as polygraphs or similar tools;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend behalf competent public authority union institution body office agency assess risk include security risk risk irregular migration health risk pose natural person intend enter enter territory member state
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by or on behalf of competent public authorities or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies to assess a risk, including a security risk, a risk of irregular migration, or a health risk, posed by a natural person who intends to enter or who has entered into the territory of a Member State;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend behalf competent public authority union institution body office agency assist competent public authority examination application asylum visa residence permit associate complaint regard eligibility natural person apply status include related assessment reliability evidence
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by or on behalf of competent public authorities or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies to assist competent public authorities for the examination of applications for asylum, visa or residence permits and for associated complaints with regard to the eligibility of the natural persons applying for a status, including related assessments of the reliability of evidence;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend behalf competent public authority union institution body office agency context migration asylum border control management purpose detecting recognise identify natural person exception verification travel document
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by or on behalf of competent public authorities, or by Union institutions, bodies, offices or agencies, in the context of migration, asylum or border control management, for the purpose of detecting, recognising or identifying natural persons, with the exception of the verification of travel documents.

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: administration justice democratic process
Raw_Text: Administration of justice and democratic processes:

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend judicial authority behalf assist judicial authority research interpret fact law apply law concrete set fact similar way alternative dispute resolution
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used by a judicial authority or on their behalf to assist a judicial authority in researching and interpreting facts and the law and in applying the law to a concrete set of facts, or to be used in a similar way in alternative dispute resolution;

Article_Name: High-risk AI systems referred to in Article 6(2)
Processed_Text: ai system intend influence outcome election referendum vote behaviour natural person exercise vote election referenda not include ai system output natural person not directly expose tool organise optimise structure political campaign administrative logistical point view
Raw_Text: AI systems intended to be used for influencing the outcome of an election or referendum or the voting behaviour of natural persons in the exercise of their vote in elections or referenda. This does not include AI systems to the output of which natural persons are not directly exposed, such as tools used to organise, optimise or structure political campaigns from an administrative or logistical point of view.

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: technical documentation refer article 11(1 shall contain follow information applicable relevant ai system
Raw_Text: The technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1) shall contain at least the following information, as applicable to the relevant AI system:

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: general description ai system include
Raw_Text: A general description of the AI system including:

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: intended purpose provider version system reflect relation previous version
Raw_Text: its intended purpose, the name of the provider and the version of the system reflecting its relation to previous versions;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: ai system interact interact hardware software include ai system not ai system applicable
Raw_Text: how the AI system interacts with, or can be used to interact with, hardware or software, including with other AI systems, that are not part of the AI system itself, where applicable;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: version relevant software firmware requirement relate version update
Raw_Text: the versions of relevant software or firmware, and any requirements related to version updates;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: description form ai system place market service software package embed hardware download api
Raw_Text: the description of all the forms in which the AI system is placed on the market or put into service, such as software packages embedded into hardware, downloads, or APIs;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: description hardware ai system intend run
Raw_Text: the description of the hardware on which the AI system is intended to run;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: ai system component product photograph illustration show external feature marking internal layout product
Raw_Text: where the AI system is a component of products, photographs or illustrations showing external features, the marking and internal layout of those products;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: basic description user interface provide deployer
Raw_Text: a basic description of the user-interface provided to the deployer;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: instruction use deployer basic description user interface provide deployer applicable
Raw_Text: instructions for use for the deployer, and a basic description of the user-interface provided to the deployer, where applicable;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: detailed description element ai system process development include
Raw_Text: A detailed description of the elements of the AI system and of the process for its development, including:

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: method step perform development ai system include relevant recourse pre train system tool provide party integrate modify provider
Raw_Text: the methods and steps performed for the development of the AI system, including, where relevant, recourse to pre-trained systems or tools provided by third parties and how those were used, integrated or modified by the provider;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: design specification system general logic ai system algorithm key design choice include rationale assumption include regard person group person respect system intend main classification choice system design optimise relevance different parameter description expect output output quality system decision possible trade technical solution adopt comply requirement set chapter iii section 2
Raw_Text: the design specifications of the system, namely the general logic of the AI system and of the algorithms; the key design choices including the rationale and assumptions made, including with regard to persons or groups of persons in respect of who, the system is intended to be used; the main classification choices; what the system is designed to optimise for, and the relevance of the different parameters; the description of the expected output and output quality of the system; the decisions about any possible trade-off made regarding the technical solutions adopted to comply with the requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: description system architecture explain software component build feed integrate overall processing computational resource develop train test validate ai system
Raw_Text: the description of the system architecture explaining how software components build on or feed into each other and integrate into the overall processing; the computational resources used to develop, train, test and validate the AI system;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: relevant data requirement term datasheet describe training methodology technique training datum set include general description data set information provenance scope main characteristic datum obtain select label procedure e.g. supervised learning datum clean methodology e.g. outlier detection
Raw_Text: where relevant, the data requirements in terms of datasheets describing the training methodologies and techniques and the training data sets used, including a general description of these data sets, information about their provenance, scope and main characteristics; how the data was obtained and selected; labelling procedures (e.g. for supervised learning), data cleaning methodologies (e.g. outliers detection);

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: assessment human oversight measure need accordance article 14 include assessment technical measure need facilitate interpretation output ai system deployer accordance article 13(3 point d
Raw_Text: assessment of the human oversight measures needed in accordance with Article 14, including an assessment of the technical measures needed to facilitate the interpretation of the outputs of AI systems by the deployers, in accordance with Article 13(3), point (d);

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: applicable detailed description pre determined change ai system performance relevant information relate technical solution adopt ensure continuous compliance ai system relevant requirement set chapter iii section 2
Raw_Text: where applicable, a detailed description of pre-determined changes to the AI system and its performance, together with all the relevant information related to the technical solutions adopted to ensure continuous compliance of the AI system with the relevant requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: validation testing procedure include information validation testing datum main characteristic metric measure accuracy robustness compliance relevant requirement set chapter iii section 2 potentially discriminatory impact test log test report date sign responsible person include regard pre determined change refer point f
Raw_Text: the validation and testing procedures used, including information about the validation and testing data used and their main characteristics; metrics used to measure accuracy, robustness and compliance with other relevant requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2, as well as potentially discriminatory impacts; test logs and all test reports dated and signed by the responsible persons, including with regard to pre-determined changes as referred to under point (f);

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: cybersecurity measure place
Raw_Text: cybersecurity measures put in place;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)
Processed_Text: detailed information monitoring functioning control ai system particular regard capability limitation performance include degree accuracy specific person group person system intend overall expect level accuracy relation intended purpose foreseeable unintended outcome source risk health safety fundamental right discrimination view intend purpose ai system human oversight measure need accordance article 14 include technical measure place facilitate interpretation output ai system deployer specification input datum appropriate
Raw_Text: Detailed information about the monitoring, functioning and control of the AI system, in particular with regard to: its capabilities and limitations in performance, including the degrees of accuracy for specific persons or groups of persons on which the system is intended to be used and the overall expected level of accuracy in relation to its intended purpose; the foreseeable unintended outcomes and sources of risks to health and safety, fundamental rights and discrimination in view of the intended purpose of the AI system; the human oversight measures needed in accordance with Article 14, including the technical measures put in place to facilitate the interpretation of the outputs of AI systems by the deployers; specifications on input data, as appropriate;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 11(1)

Raw_Text: 5. Where necessary to assess the conformity of the high-risk AI system with the requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2, after all other reasonable means to verify conformity have been exhausted and have proven to be insufficient, and upon a reasoned request, the notified body shall also be granted access to the training and trained models of the AI system, including its relevant parameters. Such access shall be subject to existing Union law on the protection of intellectual property and trade secrets.

Article_Name: Conformity based on an assessment of the quality management system and an assessment of the
Processed_Text: 6 decision notify body shall notify provider authorised representative notification shall contain conclusion assessment technical documentation reasoned assessment decision ai system conformity requirement set chapter iii section 2 notify body shall issue union technical documentation assessment certificate certificate shall indicate address provider conclusion examination condition validity datum necessary identification ai system certificate annex shall contain relevant information allow conformity ai system evaluate allow control ai system use applicable ai system not conformity requirement set chapter iii section 2 notify body shall refuse issue union technical documentation assessment certificate shall inform applicant accordingly give detailed reason refusal ai system not meet requirement relate datum train training ai system need prior application new conformity assessment case reason assessment decision notify body refuse issue union technical documentation assessment certificate shall contain specific consideration quality datum train ai system particular reason non compliance
Raw_Text: 6. The decision of the notified body shall be notified to the provider or its authorised representative. The notification shall contain the conclusions of the assessment of the technical documentation and the reasoned assessment decision. Where the AI system is in conformity with the requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2, the notified body shall issue a Union technical documentation assessment certificate. The certificate shall indicate the name and address of the provider, the conclusions of the examination, the conditions (if any) for its validity and the data necessary for the identification of the AI system. The certificate and its annexes shall contain all relevant information to allow the conformity of the AI system to be evaluated, and to allow for control of the AI system while in use, where applicable. Where the AI system is not in conformity with the requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2, the notified body shall refuse to issue a Union technical documentation assessment certificate and shall inform the applicant accordingly, giving detailed reasons for its refusal. Where the AI system does not meet the requirement relating to the data used to train it, re-training of the AI system will be needed prior to the application for a new conformity assessment. In this case, the reasoned assessment decision of the notified body refusing to issue the Union technical documentation assessment certificate shall contain specific considerations on the quality data used to train the AI system, in particular on the reasons for non-compliance.

Raw_Text: 7. Any change to the AI system that could affect the compliance of the AI system with the requirements or its intended purpose shall be assessed by the notified body which issued the Union technical documentation assessment certificate. The provider shall inform such notified body of its intention to introduce any of the abovementioned changes, or if it otherwise becomes aware of the occurrence of such changes. The intended changes shall be assessed by the notified body, which shall decide whether those changes require a new conformity assessment in accordance with Article 43(4) or whether they could be addressed by means of a supplement to the Union technical documentation assessment certificate. In the latter case, the notified body shall assess the changes, notify the provider of its decision and, where the changes are approved, issue to the provider a supplement to the Union technical documentation assessment certificate.

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: provider general purpose ai model section 1 information provide provider general purpose ai model technical documentation refer article 53(1 point shall contain follow information appropriate size risk profile model
Raw_Text: providers of general-purpose AI models Section 1 Information to be provided by all providers of general-purpose AI models The technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) shall contain at least the following information as appropriate to the size and risk profile of the model:

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: general description general purpose ai model include
Raw_Text: A general description of the general-purpose AI model including:

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: task model intend perform type nature ai system integrate
Raw_Text: the tasks that the model is intended to perform and the type and nature of AI systems in which it can be integrated;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: acceptable use policy applicable
Raw_Text: the acceptable use policies applicable;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: date release method distribution
Raw_Text: the date of release and methods of distribution;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: architecture number parameter
Raw_Text: the architecture and number of parameters;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: modality e.g. text image format input output
Raw_Text: the modality (e.g. text, image) and format of inputs and outputs;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: licence
Raw_Text: the licence.

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: detailed description element model refer point 1 relevant information process development include follow element
Raw_Text: A detailed description of the elements of the model referred to in point 1, and relevant information of the process for the development, including the following elements:

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: technical mean e.g. instruction use infrastructure tool require general purpose ai model integrate ai system
Raw_Text: the technical means (e.g. instructions of use, infrastructure, tools) required for the general-purpose AI model to be integrated in AI systems;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: design specification model training process include training methodology technique key design choice include rationale assumption model design optimise relevance different parameter applicable
Raw_Text: the design specifications of the model and training process, including training methodologies and techniques, the key design choices including the rationale and assumptions made; what the model is designed to optimise for and the relevance of the different parameters, as applicable;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: information datum training testing validation applicable include type provenance datum curation methodology e.g. cleaning filtering etc number data point scope main characteristic datum obtain select measure detect unsuitability datum source method detect identifiable bias applicable
Raw_Text: information on the data used for training, testing and validation, where applicable, including the type and provenance of data and curation methodologies (e.g. cleaning, filtering, etc.), the number of data points, their scope and main characteristics; how the data was obtained and selected as well as all other measures to detect the unsuitability of data sources and methods to detect identifiable biases, where applicable;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: computational resource train model e.g. number float point operation training time relevant detail relate training
Raw_Text: the computational resources used to train the model (e.g. number of floating point operations), training time, and other relevant details related to the training;

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: know estimate energy consumption model regard point e energy consumption model unknown energy consumption may base information computational resource section 2 additional information provide provider general purpose ai model systemic risk
Raw_Text: known or estimated energy consumption of the model. With regard to point (e), where the energy consumption of the model is unknown, the energy consumption may be based on information about computational resources used. Section 2 Additional information to be provided by providers of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: detailed description evaluation strategy include evaluation result basis available public evaluation protocol tool evaluation methodology evaluation strategy shall include evaluation criterion metric methodology identification limitation
Raw_Text: A detailed description of the evaluation strategies, including evaluation results, on the basis of available public evaluation protocols and tools or otherwise of other evaluation methodologies. Evaluation strategies shall include evaluation criteria, metrics and the methodology on the identification of limitations.

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: applicable detailed description measure place purpose conduct internal and/or external adversarial testing e.g. red teaming model adaptation include alignment fine tuning
Raw_Text: Where applicable, a detailed description of the measures put in place for the purpose of conducting internal and/or external adversarial testing (e.g. red teaming), model adaptations, including alignment and fine-tuning.

Article_Name: Technical documentation referred to in Article 53(1), point (a) — technical documentation for
Processed_Text: applicable detailed description system architecture explain software component build feed integrate overall processing
Raw_Text: Where applicable, a detailed description of the system architecture explaining how software components build or feed into each other and integrate into the overall processing.

Article_Name: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
Processed_Text: purpose determine general purpose ai model capability impact equivalent set article 51(1 point commission shall account following criterion
Raw_Text: For the purpose of determining that a general-purpose AI model has capabilities or an impact equivalent to those set out in Article 51(1), point (a), the Commission shall take into account the following criteria:

Article_Name: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
Processed_Text: number parameter model
Raw_Text: the number of parameters of the model;

Article_Name: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
Processed_Text: quality size datum set example measure token
Raw_Text: the quality or size of the data set, for example measured through tokens;

Article_Name: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
Processed_Text: computation train model measure float point operation indicate combination variable estimate cost training estimate time require training estimate energy consumption training
Raw_Text: the amount of computation used for training the model, measured in floating point operations or indicated by a combination of other variables such as estimated cost of training, estimated time required for the training, or estimated energy consumption for the training;

Article_Name: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
Processed_Text: input output modality model text text large language model text image multi modality state art threshold determine high impact capability modality specific type input output e.g. biological sequence
Raw_Text: the input and output modalities of the model, such as text to text (large language models), text to image, multi-modality, and the state of the art thresholds for determining high-impact capabilities for each modality, and the specific type of inputs and outputs (e.g. biological sequences);

Article_Name: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
Processed_Text: benchmark evaluation capability model include consider number task additional training adaptability learn new distinct task level autonomy scalability tool access
Raw_Text: the benchmarks and evaluations of capabilities of the model, including considering the number of tasks without additional training, adaptability to learn new, distinct tasks, its level of autonomy and scalability, the tools it has access to;

Article_Name: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
Processed_Text: high impact internal market reach shall presume available 10 000 register business user establish union
Raw_Text: whether it has a high impact on the internal market due to its reach, which shall be presumed when it has been made available to at least 10 000 registered business users established in the Union;

Article_Name: Criteria for the designation of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk referred to in Article 51
Processed_Text: number register end user
Raw_Text: the number of registered end-users.
